name: financials_analyze_service_coa_mapping
description:
Analyzes service items → Chart of Accounts mapping. Each service should be mapped to an income account via income_account_id. This tool LEFT JOINs services to accounts so both mapped and unmapped services are visible.

Use this tool to:
- List all unmapped services (missing income account assignment)
- Find which account a specific service is mapped to
- Find which services are mapped to a specific account (by number or name)
- Review mapping coverage and identify gaps
- Help recommend which account a service should be mapped to (by looking at similar services)

Filters:
- mapping_status: 'mapped' (has an income account), 'unmapped' (no income account), or omit for both
- service_name_search: substring search on service name (case-insensitive)
- account_names / account_numbers: filter by the mapped account
- active: 1 = active services only, 0 = inactive only, omit = all

Note: This tool does NOT have a date range filter – it returns the current state of service-to-account mappings.

Dig deeper: To manage service mappings, recommend the user visit https://my.neonpanel.com/app/services

query.description: Query envelope for service-to-COA mapping analysis.

filters.description: Filters for the analysis. company_id is required.

mapping_status.description: Filter by mapping status: 'mapped' = services with an income account assigned, 'unmapped' = services missing an income account. Omit to see both.

service_name_search.description: Substring search on service name (case-insensitive). E.g., 'shipping' to find all shipping-related services.

account_names.description: Filter by mapped account name (substring match, case-insensitive). E.g., ['shipping', 'freight'] to find services mapped to shipping/freight accounts.

account_numbers.description: Filter by mapped account number (exact match). E.g., ['40100', '51030'].

active.description: Filter by service active status: 1 = active only, 0 = inactive only. Omit for all.

mapping_status.description: 'mapped' if service has an income account assigned, 'unmapped' otherwise.

income_account_id.description: Foreign key to accounts table. NULL when unmapped.

account_number.description: Mapped account number. NULL when unmapped.

account_name.description: Mapped account name. NULL when unmapped.

account_full_name.description: Full account name including number prefix. NULL when unmapped.

account_type.description: Account type name from account_types table (e.g., 'Income', 'Other Income', 'Cost of Goods Sold'). NULL when unmapped.

account_classification.description: Account classification from account_types (Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense). NULL when unmapped.

account_type_description.description: Account type description from account_types table. NULL when unmapped.

account_statement.description: Financial statement (PL or BS). NULL when unmapped.

parent_account_name.description: Parent account name in the COA hierarchy. NULL when unmapped or no parent.

grandparent_account_name.description: Grandparent account name in the COA hierarchy. NULL when unmapped or no grandparent.

account_path.description: Full account breadcrumb path: 'Number Grandparent: Parent: Account'. NULL when unmapped.

examples.title: List all unmapped services
examples.description: Find services that are missing an income account assignment.

examples.title: All service-to-account mappings
examples.description: Show all active services with their mapped accounts.

examples.title: Search for a specific service
examples.description: Find services with 'shipping' in the name and see which accounts they map to.

examples.title: Services mapped to a specific account
examples.description: Show all services mapped to account number 40100.

examples.title: Services mapped to income accounts
examples.description: Find services mapped to accounts with 'income' in the name.
